zh.Bellaport, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾貝拉阿波特
zh.Eaton, Cheshire, England: 英國爾伊頓 白 從萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Fitton於1433年出生在英國爾時，她的父親Thomas Fitton31歲，母親Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring29歲。她於大約1453年與Robert Grosvenor在英國爾伊頓 白 從萊頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年在英國英格蘭享年47歲。

zh-hans.Eaton, Cheshire, England: 英国爾伊頓 白 從萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Fitton于1433年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Thomas Fitton31岁，母亲Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring29岁。她于大约1453年与Robert Grosvenor在英国爾伊頓 白 從萊頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年在英国英格兰享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Fitton was born in 1433, in Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Fitton, was 31 and her mother, Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring, was 29. She married Robert Grosvenor about 1453, in Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1480, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Fitton est née en 1433, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Fitton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Grosvenor environ 1453, à Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1480, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Fitton 1433 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Fitton 31 und ihre Mutter Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring 29. Sie hat um 1453 in Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, England Robert Grosvenor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 47 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fitton è nata il nel 1433 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Fitton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Robert Grosvenor circa 1453, nel Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1480, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Fittonが1433年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Fittonは31歳，母Helena "Ellen" Mainwaringは29歳であった。約1453年にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトン ビー コングレトンでRobert Grosvenorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年にイギリスイギリスで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Fitton(이)가 1433년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Fitton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1453년 영국 체실르 이턴 비 콘글레턴에서 Robert Grosvenor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fitton nasceu em 1433, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Fitton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Grosvenor aproximadamente 1453, em Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1480, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Fitton родилась в 1433 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Fitton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Grosvenor около 1453 г. в местности эатон би конглетон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1480 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Fitton nació en 1433, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Fitton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Robert Grosvenor aproximadamente 1453, en Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1480, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
